briefdescription.para: Private default constructor to enforce singleton usage and prevent direct instantiation.

parameterdescription.para: String returned if no version saved.
Byte array returned if no geometry saved.
Byte array returned if no state saved.
Point returned if no position saved.
Size returned if no size saved.
Byte array returned if not saved.

briefdescription.para: Get whether to use pass (true) or GPG (false).

parameterdescription.para: Boolean returned if not saved (defaults to false).

simplesect.para: true if using pass, false if using GPG.

parameterdescription.para: true to use pass, false for GPG.
Default value returned if not saved.
Default value returned if not saved.

briefdescription.para: Get whether to use selection (X11) for clipboard.
Get whether to use autoclear for clipboard.
Get whether to use panel autoclear.

simplesect.para: true if panel autoclear is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Get panel autoclear delay in seconds.

parameterdescription.para: Seconds to wait before clearing panel.

briefdescription.para: Get whether to hide password in UI.
Get whether to hide content (password + username).
Get whether to use monospace font.
Get whether to display password as-is (no modification).
Get whether to disable line wrapping.
Get whether to auto-add GPG ID when receiving files.
Get GPG signing key for pass.

parameterdescription.para: Key ID to use for signing.

briefdescription.para: Initialize executable paths by auto-detecting them.

simplesect.para: Path to the GPG home directory.

briefdescription.para: Check whether WebDAV integration is enabled.
Check whether Git integration is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if Git integration is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether content search (pass grep) is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Value returned if not saved (defaults to false).

simplesect.para: True if grep search is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether OTP support is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if OTP support is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether qrencode support is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if qrencode support is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether pwgen support is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pwgen support is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether uppercase characters should be avoided.

simplesect.para: True if uppercase characters are avoided.

parameterdescription.para: Whether uppercase characters should be avoided.

briefdescription.para: Check whether numeric characters should be avoided.

simplesect.para: True if numeric characters are avoided.

parameterdescription.para: Whether numeric characters should be avoided.

briefdescription.para: Check whether less random password generation is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if less random generation is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether symbol characters are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if symbol characters are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Custom characters used for password generation.

briefdescription.para: Check whether tray icon support is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if tray icon support is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Whether tray icon support is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether closing the window hides the application.

simplesect.para: True if close action hides the application.

parameterdescription.para: Whether close action should hide the application.

briefdescription.para: Check whether application should start minimized.

simplesect.para: True if application should start minimized.

briefdescription.para: Check whether main window should stay always on top.
Check whether automatic pull is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if automatic pull is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Whether automatic pull should be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether automatic push is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if automatic push is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Whether automatic push should be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether template usage is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if template usage is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Whether template usage should be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Check whether template applies to all fields.

simplesect.para: True if template applies to all fields.

parameterdescription.para: Whether template should apply to all fields.

memberdef.definition: QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > > QtPassSettings::getProfiles
memberdef.name: getProfiles

simplesect.para: Profile map keyed by profile name.

param.type: const QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > > &

parameterdescription.para: Profile map keyed by profile name.

briefdescription.para: Get currently active pass backend instance.

detaileddescription.para: Singleton that stores QtPass settings, handles persistence and defaults.
Implementation of QtPassSettings singleton. Handles persistence using QSettings with support for portable mode (qtpass.ini next to executable).

qtpasssettings.h
QtPassSettings manages all application configuration including:
Window geometry (position, size, maximized state)
Password store configuration (path, GPG settings)
Executable paths (pass, git, gpg, pwgen)
UI preferences (clipboard, autoclear, display options)
gopass configuration
Uses QSettings for persistence with a singleton pattern. All getters accept a default value returned when setting is not yet saved.
